text: A street scene in an urban area, likely India, featuring a large billboard advertising 'The RELIEFIA' (a product, possibly a contact lens or eye care product) mounted on a building. The billboard is blue and white, showing a close-up of an eye and a circular product. Below the billboard, there are smaller commercial signs and a traffic light. A multi-story building is visible on the left, and a large concrete overpass structure is on the right. The sky is overcast.
